audit_items.proof_trace: The assetOut price fetch (_getAssetPrice(assetOut, true)) at L315 is guarded by `if (eligibleAssets.length > 0)`, the same condition that allows the auction-start loop at L324 to execute — so any code path that reaches an auction start must have already called the validated price fetch. _getAssetPrice with withValidation=true reverts on zero or stale price (PriceManager.sol L409-416), ensuring auctions cannot start with an invalid assetOut price.
